text: Scaling Processes @ st © s e Launch and Terminate - SUSPEND and RESUME ¢ AddToLoadBalancer - add to LB on launch e AlarmNotification - accept notification from CW ¢ AZRebalance - Balances instances evenly across all of the AZs ¢ HealthCheck - instance health checks on/off ® ReplaceUnhealthy - Terminate unhealthy and replace ¢ ScheduledActions - Scheduled on/off e Standby - use this for instances ‘InService vs Standby’
